text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While passing behind the school building, I spot
Air Groove and Seiun Sky watering the flower
garden together.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh? Well, this sure is some nice timing.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, you look rather tired. All that trainer work
must be real tough. Sooo...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Why not water the flowers with us? It's very relaxing. ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Sky. You're trying to push your work
off onto someone else again.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, caught me red-handed. Sigh... All this watering is backbreaking...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's necessary to go and fetch water
frequently, and the academy's flower garden is
quite large, so yes, it does take a lot of effort.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Isn't there some way to make this easier?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Like, we could make a drone fly over the flowers
and water them all in one go!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Stop your scheming! My word, you'll go to any
lengths to shirk your duties.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Besides, some plants will wither if their flowers or
leaves are watered.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yikes... That sounds like a real pain.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Yes, precisely. Come along now, less chatter and
more watering.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You're here to fill in for another student, aren't
you? She's responsible for the planters over there.
Make sure you water those flowers properly, at
the very least.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Okaaay...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After being reminded that she's filling in, Seiun
Sky gets back to work without any fuss. Seeing
this, I can't help but blurt out...
choice_data_list: Why are you watering flowers in the first place?
Why are you watering flowers in the first place?
This looks tough. I'll help you out.
This looks tough. I'll help you out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After being reminded that she's filling in, Seiun
Sky gets back to work without any fuss. Seeing
this, I can't help but blurt out...
choice_data_list: Why are you watering flowers in the first place?
Why are you watering flowers in the first place?
This looks tough. I'll help you out.
This looks tough. I'll help you out.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well... I guess it's because I'm such a kindhearted
Umamusume that I couldn't bring myself to
abandon a groundskeeping committee member in
need.
choice_data_list:
(A groundskeeping committee member? That
must be...)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This is all for the better. I do hope that you'll
assist with watering on a regular basis, Sky.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I recommend it in daisy season. It's especially
pleasant.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Maybe if I feel like it?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It really is! I can't take it much longer! And I
happily accept your help!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hey! Goodness, will you never learn?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Look, it's really not healthy for me to overexert
myself this much.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Isn't there something we can streamline? Based on
what I've seen so far...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You're certainly putting an awful lot of thought
into this.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Are you... trying to lessen the groundskeeping
committee's workload?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, don't be silly. I just really love thinking up
new ways to take it easy.
